book.enigmaticdelicacy.category.food.des: No matter what situation you face, you will find that hunger will be a problem.<br2/>As a fundamental element of survival in this world, do you think it is also necessary to explore the hidden power in this area.<br2/>Finally, remember that God never treats his stomach unfairly.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.abyssal_ste: Even in the face of such a bizarre abyssal creation, you still can't help but want to taste it.<br2/>To avoid unknown reactions, you try to choose ingredients with similar properties. However, somehow the result still nauseating, not only the color, but also its aroma.<br2/>After use, your body will be

greatly boosted and your group combat ability will also be increased. But it seems that the Heart of the Abyss cannot be digested by the human body and will be vomited out after duration. Can it be reused? It may be somewhat uncomfortable.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.astral_frui: With powerful knives, even unknown fruits can be split open. Overall, after splitting, it seems that this power can be better utilized.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.astral_pops: Sometimes you do need something cool, but it seems a bit too cool? I can't feel anything hot anymore.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.astral_tree: Looking at the celestial fruit in hand, its taste flashed through your mind. Regardless of where this memory came from, you decided to keep it for more research, in order to regenerate this delicacy in the world.<br2/>Given that celestial fruits resemble apples, you have decided to use oak trees as the target for grafting,

utilizing the astral and the ender power to complete a simple grafting.<br2/>But ordinary soil cannot allow it to grow, and even rich soil can only make it grow into short plants, but you have no other choice.
Celestial fruits require a long process of flowering and fruiting, and generally cannot be ripened through ripening unless you have the ability to manipulate the time.
In addition to providing endless celestial fruits, the astral tree also has many practical by-products such as bark and leaves. To food or accessories, they can be further developed.
When it comes to the wood itself, astral wood products are more resilient than ordinary wood products and are not easily ignited by flames. Regardless of aesthetics, practicality still exists.

The leaves with a sense of tranquility feels like a good ingredient for brewing tea, paired with milk and honey, a simple but effective calming tea is made.
In terms of taste, completely different from the Potion of Cosmic.

The glittering bark contains lots of magic, and we can use the Heart of the Earth as a carrier to strengthen its abilities. Unlike other hearts' transformations, it possesses its own consciousness and utilizes renewable energy within to protect its owner.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.balanced_st: It seems a pity to completely abandon the curse from the forbidden fruit, but it does block the pleasure of savoring food. After development, such a balanced choice between the two emerged.<br2/>During the duration of the redemption effect, except for the limitations on life recovery that still exist partly, you will feel hungry

like a normal person, but it seems hard to know the exact situation of hunger.<br2/>In addition, there is no need to worry about the consumption of the potion. This soup can naturally recover before it is completely consumed.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.cosmic_cake: When get the Etherium machete, you want to try out it's true differences. Faced with the Eternal Cake, other knives willingly succumbed, but the Etherium machete persisted until the end. <br2/>Why can't we cut off that last piece? Well, you think that must be some basic principle of the world.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.curse_blade: We have been searching for more answers to break the Ring od the Seven Curses, and here is a new idea.<br2/>Attempting to directly sever the physical connection between the Ring and the body, although the cost may be significant, is undoubtedly the most convenient way. But what to use for execution is the fatal question.
Set your gaze on a strange charm - Hell Blade Charm.<br2/>As items with curses and sharp double-edged edges, we may as well shatter them and use the two edges to complete this action.

Place your fingers on the cutting board, and with a crisp sound, the Ring of Seven Curses is released. Accompanied by intense pain, a slightly damaged knife and a Cursed Soul Crystal.<br2/>But for now, you could be a bit happier about getting rid of the seven curses.
Finally, by using the potion of Recall to rescue all souls trapped in the Cursed Soul Crystal, we can truly escape from the suffering caused by the Seven Curses.
After all of this, there may still be some soul fragments left in your hands. Why not use them to forge some unique items.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.divine_frui: If you have not been baptized by the Seven Curses, then you are not qualified to read this entry.<br2/>Celestial Fruit and Bottle of Ichor, no one can resist their temptation, and the probability of them appearing in the inventory at the same time is next to nothing. How did you discover them? Did you rely on mysterious power?
Although a plate can be divided, there is no guarantee that it will allow you to expand the curios slot. However, you may also get more slots.<br2/>This is a bet with the gods.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.enchantment: Similarly, Tome of Hungering Knowledge is still making people want to constantly make and try to craft.<br2/>This time, it brings magic from the Astral Tree, which allows it to perfectly replicate the enchantments stored in the item without changing any of them.
Of course, whether it is a good or bad enchantment, it will try to replicate it together. The power of this Astral Tree is still too pure.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.enigmatic_f: For unknown reason, this ancient crop has long disappeared, but its tenacious vitality has allowed them to survive in the form of seeds. Perhaps you should try tasting its fruit.<br2/>The plump fruit is filled with transparent juice, and the taste is very sticky. Do you think it should be processed first.
In various ruins, you can find these eerie and dark seeds, but it seems that ordinary farmland cannot support their growth. Perhaps you should try to explore the true potential of the land.

After simple processing, the crystal clear jelly like object sways like slime on the plate, and the taste becomes good. In addition, after eating, you also become transparent, which seems to be very advantageous for surprise attacks.
This sweet taste can not only quench thirst, but also greatly stimulate your self-healing ability, perhaps a powerful emergency food.
Although the material looks  a little hard, the solubility of Cream is beyond imagination. Beside the fresh and delicate taste, the permanent and temporary effects are also very attractive.
The bright color and spicy taste of this food are sure to arouse your passion and make you more immersed in intense battles.

In order to give better play to the fading effect, the scroll was used as a carrier, smeared with cream and engraved with arcane text to obtain such a new scroll.
This scroll can intermittently provide color fading effects, allowing you to better conceal.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.enigmatic_r: By using simple kitchen utensils and techniques, we can also bring those strange materials to the dining table and unleash their unique effects.<br2/>Of course, we have also discovered some lost recipes that can make more items renewable.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.etherium_ma: The wide blade of this knife determines that it can not only cut through ingredients in the kitchen, but also turn more creatures into your food. Although it feels slightly heavy, it is not worth mentioning compared to excellent damage.<br2/>Compared to the need for collection, you seem to think that combat skills are more
suitable for this tool. Unlike the agile retreat of the broadsword, a radical charge is also necessary.<br2/>Of course, whether to use it for combat or escape depends on your choice.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.etherium_st: This is the 'Ultimate Weapon' in the kitchen.<br2/>The etherium is suitable for heat transfer in kitchen pots, and the use of star dust as fuel to provide a powerful heat source, shaping this most powerful kitchen tool. And compared to other traditional heating methods, etherium stove can almost halve the cooking time of all foods, greatly
saving you time wasted in the kitchen.<br2/>In addition, the renovation of this stove has added an infinite fuel furnace to the kitchen, maximizing space utilization.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.gluttony_ch: Called voracity, but it's actually not. After being upgraded, this charm has become even more powerful to torture your stomach.<br2/>It can amplify your thirst for food in your heart and transform it into various powers. You can only endure the present moment, just for a beautiful banquet after the battle.

In addition, you can feel that in battle, the desire for gluttony sometimes intertwines with the desire to kill, generating more power and compensating for the overflow of their respective excess desires.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.harmonious_: Although many people are aware of the powerful combined effect of the Unholy Grail and the Forbidden Fruit, there are still many who are unwilling to sacrifice countless delicacies for this fleeting pleasure. Under the collision of these two ideas, this recipe was developed.<br2/>Putting the forbidden fruit into the grail and watching the
liquid gradually take on a different color, you feel like it's time to taste it.<br2/>Taking a sip of thick liquid and pairing it with sliced fruit pieces at the edge of the grail, the delicate taste
is unforgettable. If you have ever tasted Celestial Fruit, you will surely be able to sense a similar flavor.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.hungry_char: The idea of using food to make charms first appeared in my mind. Let's give it a try.<br2/>But the result was somewhat unexpected. Such a charm cannot make people enjoy delicious food, but rather need to control their hunger.
And this good ham with a golden coat looks even more tempting. But as a charm, it seems that you still need to restrain your desires.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.ichor_bottl: Now you have obtained the recipe for the Bottle of Ichor, an ancient relic, but what you didn't expect is that behind the powerful relic is also such a simple recipe.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.ichoroot_so: Ichoroot Soup can amplify the divine part in the ichoroot, becoming a stable source for obtaining purified resistance effects.
Whatever it is, we are always seeking its ultimate form. Farmland is no exception.<br2/>Integrate the Essence of Raging Life into the land with the full power of nature. This shimmering land will ripen the crops above at an extreme speed without any cost, and it also works on certain plants that normal fertilizers have no effect on.
With high-quality nutrition supply, some crops can bring double the harvest.<br2/>Notice that the Essence is still an active thing, and ordinary rich soil can have a wonderful effect on the side.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.purified_dr: Purified Dragon Breath can turn yourself into a lingering potion, spreading the potion effects on your body to the surroundings, whether positive or negative.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.redemption_: The production of the Redemption Potion inevitably requires the use of the Forbidden Fruit itself, but we can only achieve it through the Forbidden Fruit itself, there is no other way.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.stuffed_ast: By cutting the teleportato and using chorus fruit as ingredient, you will find that not only has the quantity increased, but also there is a reaction between two food, causing the Ender Mobs to lose their teleportation power temporarily.
book.enigmaticdelicacy.entry.weapon_char: Different weapons have different combat style, and there should be different ways to strengthen them according to different situations.<br2/>This shining charm cast from multiple sharp weapons, which will give you different strengthening methods based on your main weapon.

Known enhancements:
Low Attack Speed: Increases critical damage by <&l>+50%%$(clear).
High Attack Speed: The target of the attack is given a weakened effect.
commands.enigmaticdelicacy.refreshEffect: Cleared all permanent food effects for %1$s entities
Cleared all permanent food effects of %1$s
item.enigmaticdelicacy.blooded_cursed_ri: Blooded Ring of the Seven Curses
message.enigmaticdelicacy.cursed_sleep_w: The Astral tea soothes the unease in your heart, temporarily forgetting those troubles and fears. Although the effect is limited, please enjoy the peaceful sleep of this night...
